\tzpentry{ID4828}{Trawin Cymatic Hamiltonian}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID4828 introduces Trawin Cymatic Hamiltonian as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
$$H_Trawin = H_tunnel + H_ER + H_SC + H_cymatic + H_TZP$$
